name: python3-vulners
title: python3-vulners
description:
Vulners API v3 Python wrapper (Python 3)
This package contains a Python 3 library for the Vulners Database. It
provides search, data retrieval, archive and vulnerability scanning API's for
the integration purposes. With this library you can create powerful security
tools and get access to the world largest security database.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-vulners because Vulners API v3 Python wrapper (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-vulners as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-vulners with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-vulners --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
